message:
fix(config): fix 22 compilation errors and 3 test failures in committed tests (wa-3gzkj)

- keys.rs: PhysKeyCode::KeyA -> PhysKeyCode::A (variant doesn't exist)
- keys.rs: fix expected DeferredKeyCode::to_string output ("mapped:x")
- meta.rs: add Debug derive to ConfigContainer (needed by assert_eq!)
- color.rs: disambiguate AnsiColor::Blue.into() with Into::<u8>::into
- bell.rs: fix easing test expectations to match Bernstein polynomial
  (not CSS cubic-bezier) implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
